title: otiophora calycophylla
intro: Otiophora calycophylla is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Otiophora calycophylla include its potential use in treating fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
